title: Harness domain pack manifest
description: Describes how a domain/industry pack adapts the harness engine. Validated structurally by `node scripts/harness/domain-pack.mjs --self-test`.

name.description: kebab-case pack id; must match the directory name

deliverableKind.description: What the pack produces, e.g. 'Equity research memo'

stages.description: The domain-relabeled stage machine (same shape as the software harness: understand -> plan -> produce -> review breadth -> review depth -> feedback).

gates.description: Domain analogue of the five architectural gates: checks the planner must clear before producing.

checks.description: Deterministic deliverable checks (the domain's lint/test). `run` is a shell command; the token {{deliverable}} is replaced with the file under inspection.

loops.description: Loop file basenames present under <pack>/loops/. Copied into .github/harness/loops/ by `domain-pack activate`.

skill.description: Pack-relative path to the domain skill (SKILL.md)

configPreset.description: Pack-relative path to a harness.config.json preset

samples.description: Pack-relative sample deliverables. `good` must pass every check; `broken` must fail at least one.
